description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof covered in weathered shingles and a prominent brick chimney. The front features a small covered porch with a wooden bench and steps leading up to the entrance, which is flanked by a single window. The side elevations show horizontal wooden siding and a pair of rectangular windows on one side, while the rear is mostly solid wood with a single small square window. The roof has deep overhangs, and the overall structure is compact and sturdy, typical of traditional cabins. The materials and construction suggest a cozy, insulated interior suitable for residential use.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, brick chimney, covered porch, and simple window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, a front window, and steps leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long gable roof, two rectangular side windows, and the brick chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wooden wall and a single small square window near the roof peak.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gable roof, two rectangular windows, and partial view of the porch.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with deep overhangs, covered in weathered asphalt shingles, and a central brick chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Three windows: one medium-sized rectangular window on the front, two rectangular windows grouped together on one side, and a single small square window centered high on the rear wall; arrangement is asymmetrical
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch and steps
